title: More Weapons!
description: Adds new unique weapons to Minecraft.
body:
Adds more weapons to minecraft.

<details>
<summary>Added items</summary>

```
Obsidian sword:
Late-game sword, better than netherite. May change recipe to include netherite in the future.
Crafting:
D = Diamond
O = Obsidian
B = Blaze Rod
ODO
ODO
 B

Emerald Sword:
Early-game sword, about as good as iron.
Crafting:
E = Emerald
S = Stick
 E
 E
 S

1.8 Sword:
Attacks the same as diamond, but has no cooldown between hits.
Crafting:
D = Diamond Sword
C = Cobweb
CCC
CDC
CCC

```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Coming Soon</summary>

```
Glass Sword: Deals a lot of damage but has extremely low durability.
```


</details>




Feel free to give balance suggestions, or new sword ideas! If you inspire a sword, I'll add your name in the tooltip (if you want)

⚠️IF YOU ASK FOR FORGE YOU FORFEIT YOUR KNEES⚠️
